items.name_en: Sage Green · New Size
items.name_cn:
Sage Green · New Size
JAMIE 4.3 · 29cm
The new large bag really hit the spot, who understands? 💕
Imported Italian lamb skin. The overall bag shape features a classic vintage distressed design, breaking elements for a very stylish look that won't go out of style. The basic style can also be paired with a lot of feel, not a common sight. Durable material, versatile for commuting, super large capacity, unexpectedly lightweight, and high practicality. An absolute must-have item! 😎
Style No.: 809696
Size: 29×21×9.5cm

items.name_cn:
🆂🅰︎🅸🅽🆃 🅻🅰︎🆄🆁🅴🅽🆃
【 NiKi 】Versatile Style 28cm Saint Laurent Classic Niki Elephant Print Front Flap Leather Handbag. A super popular style among celebrities and influencers, hard to find at the counter! The globally popular Niki large capacity elephant print cowhide! Adorned with V-shaped visible stitching, CASSANDRE texture, lightweight, with two compartments, a large patch pocket on the back, and a sliding chain shoulder strap. Can be worn over the shoulder or crossbody, plus one external back pocket! Magnetic snap closure, two internal pockets!
Item No: 633178
Color: Black Elephant Print / Antique Silver Chain
Size: 28×20×8.5cm
Chain Length: 30 - 53cm
